##NAMES=Hillebrandite
##RRUFFID=R110067
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_2_SiO_3_(OH)_2_
##LOCALITY=Terneras mine, Velardeña, Velardeña District, Municipio de Cuencamé, Durango, Mexico
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Renato & Adriana Pagano
##DESCRIPTION=White, fine-grained massive. Cell parameters are given that match Dai and Post (1995) but the diffraction results indicate lower symmetry.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110067
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 3.643 b: 16.314 c: 11.823 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 702.6 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
